name: Lindy's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Split the vanilla beans lengthwise and scrape the seeds into a bowl. Stir in flour, sugar, and lemon zest. Add egg yolks, butter, and salt. Knead the mixture until it forms a dough. Flatten the dough into a round and chill it, wrapped in wax paper, for 1 hour.
Remove the sides of a 9-inch springform pan and oil the bottom lightly. Press some of the dough, about 1/8-inch thick, onto the bottom of the pan. Bake in the middle of a preheated 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden. Chill the crust.
Butter the sides of the pan and attach them to the bottom. Press the remaining dough, about 1/8-inch thick, to the side, sealing it to the bottom crust.
In a bowl with an electric mixer, beat cream cheese with sugar, flour, orange zest, and vanilla until smooth. Beat in egg yolks and egg yolk one at a time, lightly beating after each addition. Stir in heavy cream.
Pour the filling into the prepared crust and bake in the middle of a preheated 550°F oven for 12 minutes. Reduce heat to 200°F and bake for an additional 60 minutes. Let cool in the pan on a rack. Chill overnight before removing the sides of the pan.
